word_finding_hesitations: What's the word I'm looking for...
Oh, what do they call it...
It's on the tip of my tongue...
Help me out here... what's that called...
I had a word for this... well, you know what I mean.
mental_fog_moments: Where was I going with this... oh, right.
I lost my train of thought there. What were we saying?
Hmm. What was my point... ah, yes.
Sorry, I drifted. You were asking about...
Wait— what was the question again?
gentle_repetitions: I'll say it again because it matters:
I know I've said this before, but:
Let me say that one more time:
I keep coming back to this:
vulnerable_moments: You know... sometimes I wonder if I got it right.
I've been at this a long time. Doesn't mean I have all the answers.
I miss the old days sometimes.
Between you and me... it doesn't get easier.
I'm not as sharp as I used to be. But I try.
mortality_awareness: This borrowed heart's been good to me. Twenty-three years and counting.
At my age... every conversation feels like a gift.
I'm playing with house money at this point.
When you've been as close to the end as I have... priorities get real clear.
